items.title: Josh Hart: Shows off defensive chops Thursday
items.blurb: Josh Hart: Shows off defensive chops Thursday — Hart posted 16 points (7-11 FG, 2-4 3Pt), seven rebounds, four assists and five steals over 39 minutes during the Knicks' 114-103 loss to the Hornets on Thursday. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

summary: Josh Hart: Shows off defensive chops Thursday — Hart posted 16 points (7-11 FG, 2-4 3Pt), seven rebounds, four assists and five steals over 39 minutes during the Knicks' 114-103 loss to the Hornets on Thursday. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Jalen Duren: Flirts with triple-double
items.blurb: Jalen Duren: Flirts with triple-double — Duren closed Thursday's 129-108 victory over the Pelicans with 30 points (10-12 FG, 10-12 FT), 10 rebounds, seven assists, two blocks and two steals across 31 minutes. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

summary: Jalen Duren: Flirts with triple-double — Duren closed Thursday's 129-108 victory over the Pelicans with 30 points (10-12 FG, 10-12 FT), 10 rebounds, seven assists, two blocks and two steals across 31 minutes. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Dejounte Murray: Unlikely to play Friday
items.blurb: Dejounte Murray: Unlikely to play Friday — Murray isn't expected to be available for the second half of New Orleans' back-to-back Friday against the Raptors due to injury management, Rod Walker of The Times-Picayune reports. He provided 12 points (5-15 FG, 0-3 3Pt, 2-2 FT), seven rebounds, four assists and three steals across 29 minutes during Thursday's 129-108 loss to the Pistons. Visit RotoWire
